headline: Hakan Fidan [Turkish Foreign Minister] is pursuing a very aggressive and offensive foreign policy against Israel," - Amichai Chikli, Israeli Minister of Diaspora Affairs.

The Turks are currently establishing bases in northern Syria. These soldiers of al-Julani are already declaring that they are aiming their arrows at Jerusalem," - Amichai Chikli, Israeli Minister of Diaspora Affairs.

We must convince Washington that Turkey is a dictator affiliated with the Muslim Brotherhood, half of whose opposition is languishing in prison and who spreads virulent anti-Semitic propaganda, is not an ally and should not be a member of NATO," - Amichai Chikli, Israeli Minister of Diaspora Affairs.
We must strengthen cooperation with the axis of the Eastern Mediterranean countries [against Turkey]: Greece, Cyprus, Israel, Italy," - Amichai Chikli, Israeli Minister of Diaspora Affairs.

The U.S. State Department has cleared a potential $3.5 billion Foreign Military Sale to Germany, including up to 173 SM-6 Block I and 577 SM-2 Block IIIC missiles, plus related equipment and services. The sale aims to equip Germany’s future F127-class ships with integrated Aegis-based air and missile defense, with Raytheon as the prime contractor.

Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu when asked about New York mayor-elect Zohran Mamdani:

– "Am I afraid of going there (New York)? Hell, no. Of course not."

– "It’s good to be a young leader, but it’s not good to be a young, uneducated leader in the sense of not knowing economics, not knowing what antisemitism is, not knowing who the bad guys are. I think you should brush up on that. Then we might have a conversation."

(Times of Israel)

headline: Hamas and the Palestinian Islamic Jihad announced in a joint statement that they will hand over the body of an Israeli captive to the Red Cross at 8:00 PM tonight. The body was found in Khan Yunis, southern Gaza. - Cradle

content: BJP leader Dilip Ghosh pinned his party's hopes in Bengal on the Bihar results. "Bihar is a neighbouring state (to West Bengal), and Nitish Kumar has a credible image. If NDA wins in the Bihar elections, that will also help the BJP in Bengal," Ghosh said.
headline: Bihar Exit Poll Results 2025 : Dilip Ghosh says NDA's win in Bihar will also help BJP in Bengal

content: Ahead of the counting of votes on 14th November, BJP workers in Patna come together to prepare laddoos. They say that they are preparing 501 kg of laddoos.
headline: Bihar Exit Poll Results 2025: BJP workers prepare 501 kg of laddoos

headline: All of India’s neighbours, except Pakistan, condemned the Delhi blasts that killed 15 people. Similarly, all of Pakistan’s neighbours, except India, condemned the Islamabad bombing that killed 12 people.

headline: The widely circulated report by Israel Hayom is inaccurate and stems from a misinterpretation of Hezbollah’s open letter issued today. In reality, Hezbollah did not state that it would respond. The group merely informed the Lebanese government that ongoing violations are unlawful and could potentially prompt a response in the future. However, this does not indicate that any decision has been made, and the letter primarily emphasized allowing the Lebanese Army to handle the matter.
